queries.question: Show me the name, total population and dominant party for each district with a population greater than 70000
queries.sql:
SELECT name, totalPopulation, partyName
FROM Districts
JOIN Dominating_Party ON Districts.districtId = Dominating_Party.districtId
WHERE totalPopulation > 70000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?totalpopulation ?partyname WHERE {
  ?districts a :Districts .
  ?dominating_party a :Dominating_Party .
  ?dominating_party p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?districts p:name ?name .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?dominating_party p:partyName ?partyname .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 70000)
}

queries.question: show me the dominating party of the district C
queries.sql:
SELECT pl.partyName 
FROM Districts d
JOIN Dominating_Party pl
ON d.districtId = pl.districtId WHERE d.name = 'District C'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?partyname WHERE {
  ?d a :Districts .
  ?pl a :Dominating_Party .
  ?pl p:hasDistricts ?d .
  ?pl p:partyName ?partyname .
  ?d p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(?name_f = "District C")
}

queries.question: show me the political leanings of the district C
queries.sql:
SELECT pl.partyName, pi.IdeologyName 
FROM Districts d
JOIN Dominating_Party pl
ON d.districtId = pl.districtId JOIN Prevalent_Ideology pi
ON d.districtId = pi.districtId WHERE d.name = 'District C'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?partyname ?ideologyname WHERE {
  ?d a :Districts .
  ?pl a :Dominating_Party .
  ?pl p:hasDistricts ?d .
  ?pi a :Prevalent_Ideology .
  ?pi p:hasDistricts ?d .
  ?pl p:partyName ?partyname .
  ?pi p:ideologyName ?ideologyname .
  ?d p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(?name_f = "District C")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the name, total population and political leanings for districts with a population greater than 70000
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?totalpopulation ?partyname WHERE {
  ?districts a :Districts .
  ?dominating_party a :Dominating_Party .
  ?dominating_party p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?districts p:name ?name .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?dominating_party p:partyName ?partyname .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 70000)
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name ?totalpopulation ?ideologyname WHERE {
  ?districts a :Districts .
  ?prevalent_ideology a :Prevalent_Ideology .
  ?prevalent_ideology p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?districts p:name ?name .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?prevalent_ideology p:ideologyName ?ideologyname .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 70000)
} }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?totalpopulation ?partyname ?ideologyname WHERE {
  ?districts a :Districts .
  ?dominating_party a :Dominating_Party .
  ?dominating_party p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?prevalent_ideology a :Prevalent_Ideology .
  ?prevalent_ideology p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?districts p:name ?name .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation .
  ?dominating_party p:partyName ?partyname .
  ?prevalent_ideology p:ideologyName ?ideologyname .
  ?districts p:totalPopulation ?totalpopulation_f .
  FILTER(?totalpopulation_f > 70000)
} }
}
